scenarios.name: AI Talent Flight Crisis
scenarios.description: Key AI researchers and engineers are leaving for competitors and startups, threatening critical machine learning initiatives. The tech company must respond to retain talent and maintain competitive edge.

customization.context: Responsible for technical strategy and AI roadmap
Leading AI research initiatives and team
Evaluating retention program costs and ROI
Managing AI product delivery and team morale

round_structure: Talent flight assessment: Departures and at-risk employees
Competitive landscape: Where talent is going and why
Compensation benchmarking: Market rates and equity packages
Non-monetary retention: Culture, mission, and growth opportunities
Organizational changes: Reporting structures and autonomy
Communication strategy: Internal and external messaging
Retention program rollout: Immediate and long-term actions

required: List of departed and at-risk AI talent
Current AI team org chart and criticality ratings
AI project roadmap and talent dependencies

environment_config.decision_mechanism: Executive team consensus on retention investments
environment_config.escalation_trigger: Critical talent departure triggers emergency response
environment_config.coalition_dynamics: Finance-controlled costs vs. engineering talent needs

scenarios.name: Platform Antitrust Response
scenarios.description: Regulatory authorities are investigating the tech platform for anti-competitive practices. The company must develop a response strategy that addresses concerns while preserving business model viability.

customization.context: Leading legal defense and regulatory negotiations
Evaluating structural and business model changes
Assessing product integration and unbundling options
Managing government relations and public narrative
Enforcing competition law and market fairness

round_structure: Investigation briefing: Allegations and evidence review
Legal defense strategy: Arguments and precedents
Business model analysis: Integration vs. separation options
Remedy scenario planning: Potential outcomes and responses
Structural remedy preparation: Operational separation plans
Public communication: Narrative and stakeholder management
Strategic decision: Fight vs. settle commitment

required: Market share and competitive analysis data

environment_config.decision_mechanism: Board-level decision on settlement vs. litigation
environment_config.escalation_trigger: Enforcement action filing triggers emergency response
environment_config.coalition_dynamics: Legal caution vs. aggressive defense advocates
